title: AI-related restructuring in Romanian SMEs: reproducible analysis kit
description: Reproducible analysis kit for the article 'Capability pressure and AI-related restructuring in a transition EU economy: Evidence from Romanian SMEs'. The kit reproduces quantitative survey tables and figures for SME-only and comparator analyses. Raw LimeSurvey exports, technical metadata and open-text responses are excluded from the public release.
notes: Software DOI not yet minted. The dataset DOI is an associated dataset DOI and must not be used as the software DOI for this repository.
